This page is part of the Référentiel Unique de l'Interopérabilité du Médicament (v0.0.1: STU 1) based on FHIR (HL7® FHIR® Standard) R4. This is the current published version in its permanent home (it will always be available at this URL). For a full list of available versions, see the Directory of published versions

  • Content
  • Detailed Descriptions
  • Mappings
  • Examples
  • XML
  • JSON
  • TTL

Resource Profile: Profil RUIM - CodeSystem médicament

Official URL: https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/ruim/StructureDefinition/profile-ruim-codesystem Version: 0.0.1
Draft as of 2026-03-30 Computable Name: ProfileRuimCodeSystem

Profil contraignant la ressource CodeSystem pour le référentiel RUIM. Définit les propriétés attendues pour décrire une spécialité pharmaceutique identifiée par son code CIP-13.

Utilisations:

  • Exemples pour ce/t/te Profil: CodeSystem/MinimalRuim

Vous pouvez également vérifier les usages dans le FHIR IG Statistics

Formal Views of Profile Content

Description of Profiles, Differentials, Snapshots and how the different presentations work.

  • Key Elements Table
  • Differential Table
  • Snapshot Table
  • Statistics/References
  • All
NomDrapeauxCard.TypeDescription et contraintes    Filter:
Bindings
Contraintes
Obligations
CodeSystem C 1..1 Shareable CodeSystem(4.0.1) Declares the existence of and describes a code system or code system supplement
Constraints: csd-0, csd-1
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
Constraints: ext-1
url Σ 1..1 uri Canonical identifier for this code system, represented as a URI (globally unique) (Coding.system)
Motif requis: http://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/CodeSystem/terminologie-ruim-eprescription
version Σ 1..1 string Business version of the code system (Coding.version)
name ΣC 1..1 string Name for this code system (computer friendly)
Motif requis: RUIM eeprescription
title Σ 1..1 string Name for this code system (human friendly)
Motif requis: RUIM - european eprescription
status ?!Σ 1..1 code draft | active | retired | unknown
Binding: PublicationStatus (required): The lifecycle status of an artifact.
experimental Σ 1..1 boolean For testing purposes, not real usage
publisher Σ 1..1 string Name of the publisher (organization or individual)
description 1..1 markdown Natural language description of the code system
caseSensitive Σ 1..1 boolean If code comparison is case sensitive
content Σ 1..1 code not-present | example | fragment | complete | supplement
Binding: CodeSystemContentMode (required): The extent of the content of the code system (the concepts and codes it defines) are represented in a code system resource.
Slices pour property Σ 0..* BackboneElement Propriétés des spécialités pharmaceutiques
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:code
property:Toutes les slices Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
code Σ 1..1 code Identifies the property on the concepts, and when referred to in operations
Binding: VSRuimPropertyCodes (0.0.1) (extensible)
type Σ 1..1 code code | Coding | string | integer | boolean | dateTime | decimal
Binding: PropertyType (required): The type of a property value.
property:packageType SΣ 0..1 BackboneElement Type de conditionnement
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
code Σ 1..1 code Identifies the property on the concepts, and when referred to in operations
Binding: VSRuimPropertyCodes (0.0.1) (extensible)

uri Σ 0..1 uri Formal identifier for the property
Motif requis: http://data.esante.gouv.fr/ansm/medicament/packageType
description Σ 0..1 string Why the property is defined, and/or what it conveys
Motif requis: Type de contenant du médicament (ex : flacon, plaquette, ampoule).
type Σ 1..1 code code | Coding | string | integer | boolean | dateTime | decimal
Binding: PropertyType (required): The type of a property value.
Motif requis: string
property:packageSize SΣ 0..1 BackboneElement Taille du conditionnement
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
code Σ 1..1 code Identifies the property on the concepts, and when referred to in operations
Binding: VSRuimPropertyCodes (0.0.1) (extensible)
Motif requis: packageSize
uri Σ 0..1 uri Formal identifier for the property
Motif requis: http://data.esante.gouv.fr/ansm/medicament/packageSize
description Σ 0..1 string Why the property is defined, and/or what it conveys
Motif requis: Nombre d'unités dans le conditionnement (ex : 1, 4, 28).
type Σ 1..1 code code | Coding | string | integer | boolean | dateTime | decimal
Binding: PropertyType (required): The type of a property value.
Motif requis: string
property:doseForm SΣ 0..1 BackboneElement Forme pharmaceutique
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
code Σ 1..1 code Identifies the property on the concepts, and when referred to in operations
Binding: VSRuimPropertyCodes (0.0.1) (extensible)
Motif requis: doseForm
uri Σ 0..1 uri Formal identifier for the property
Motif requis: http://data.esante.gouv.fr/ansm/medicament/doseForm
description Σ 0..1 string Why the property is defined, and/or what it conveys
Motif requis: Forme galénique du médicament (ex : comprimé, solution pour perfusion).
type Σ 1..1 code code | Coding | string | integer | boolean | dateTime | decimal
Binding: PropertyType (required): The type of a property value.
Motif requis: string
property:brandName SΣ 0..1 BackboneElement Nom de marque
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
code Σ 1..1 code Identifies the property on the concepts, and when referred to in operations
Binding: VSRuimPropertyCodes (0.0.1) (extensible)
Motif requis: brandName
uri Σ 0..1 uri Formal identifier for the property
Motif requis: http://data.esante.gouv.fr/ansm/medicament/brandName
description Σ 0..1 string Why the property is defined, and/or what it conveys
Motif requis: Dénomination commerciale du médicament. Actuellement, le brandname est enrichi par les libellés de spécialité. Le partage du nom de marque est en cours de validation.
type Σ 1..1 code code | Coding | string | integer | boolean | dateTime | decimal
Binding: PropertyType (required): The type of a property value.
Motif requis: string
property:activeStrength SΣ 0..* BackboneElement Dosage du principe actif
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
code Σ 1..1 code Identifies the property on the concepts, and when referred to in operations
Binding: VSRuimPropertyCodes (0.0.1) (extensible)
Motif requis: activeStrength
uri Σ 0..1 uri Formal identifier for the property
Motif requis: http://data.esante.gouv.fr/ansm/medicament/activeStrength
description Σ 0..1 string Why the property is defined, and/or what it conveys
Motif requis: Quantité de principe actif par unité de prise (ex : 10 mg pour 1 ml).
type Σ 1..1 code code | Coding | string | integer | boolean | dateTime | decimal
Binding: PropertyType (required): The type of a property value.
Motif requis: string
property:activeIngredient SΣ 0..* BackboneElement Principe actif (DCI)
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
code Σ 1..1 code Identifies the property on the concepts, and when referred to in operations
Binding: VSRuimPropertyCodes (0.0.1) (extensible)
Motif requis: activeIngredient
uri Σ 0..1 uri Formal identifier for the property
Motif requis: http://data.esante.gouv.fr/ansm/medicament/activeIngredient
description Σ 0..1 string Why the property is defined, and/or what it conveys
Motif requis: Dénomination commune internationale du principe actif.
type Σ 1..1 code code | Coding | string | integer | boolean | dateTime | decimal
Binding: PropertyType (required): The type of a property value.
Motif requis: string
concept 1..* BackboneElement Concepts in the code system
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
code 1..1 code Code that identifies concept

Bindings terminologiques

Chemin Statut Usage Jeu de valeurs (ValueSet) Version Source
CodeSystem.status Base required PublicationStatus 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
CodeSystem.content Base required CodeSystemContentMode 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
CodeSystem.property.​code Base extensible RUIM - ValueSet des codes de propriétés médicament 📍0.0.1 cet IG

CodeSystem.property:packageSize.​code Base extensible RUIM - ValueSet des codes de propriétés médicament 📍0.0.1 cet IG
CodeSystem.property:packageSize.​type Base required PropertyType 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR

CodeSystem.property:doseForm.​type Base required PropertyType 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
CodeSystem.property:brandName.​code Base extensible RUIM - ValueSet des codes de propriétés médicament 📍0.0.1 cet IG
CodeSystem.property:brandName.​type Base required PropertyType 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
CodeSystem.property:activeStrength.​code Base extensible RUIM - ValueSet des codes de propriétés médicament 📍0.0.1 cet IG
CodeSystem.property:activeStrength.​type Base required PropertyType 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
CodeSystem.property:activeIngredient.​code Base extensible RUIM - ValueSet des codes de propriétés médicament 📍0.0.1 cet IG
CodeSystem.property:activeIngredient.​type Base required PropertyType 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR

Contraintes

Id Grade Chemin(s) Description Expression
csd-0 warning CodeSystem Name should be usable as an identifier for the module by machine processing applications such as code generation name.matches('[A-Z]([A-Za-z0-9_]){0,254}')
csd-1 error CodeSystem Within a code system definition, all the codes SHALL be unique concept.code.combine($this.descendants().concept.code).isDistinct()
dom-2 error CodeSystem If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error CodeSystem If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error CodeSystem If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error CodeSystem If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 bonne pratique CodeSystem A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error CodeSystem.implicitRules, CodeSystem.modifierExtension, CodeSystem.url, CodeSystem.version, CodeSystem.name, CodeSystem.title, CodeSystem.status, CodeSystem.experimental, CodeSystem.publisher, CodeSystem.description, CodeSystem.caseSensitive, CodeSystem.content, CodeSystem.property, CodeSystem.property.modifierExtension, CodeSystem.property.code, CodeSystem.property.type, CodeSystem.property:packageType, CodeSystem.property:packageType.modifierExtension, CodeSystem.property:packageType.code, CodeSystem.property:packageType.uri, CodeSystem.property:packageType.description, CodeSystem.property:packageType.type, CodeSystem.property:packageSize, CodeSystem.property:packageSize.modifierExtension, CodeSystem.property:packageSize.code, CodeSystem.property:packageSize.uri, CodeSystem.property:packageSize.description, CodeSystem.property:packageSize.type, CodeSystem.property:doseForm, CodeSystem.property:doseForm.modifierExtension, CodeSystem.property:doseForm.code, CodeSystem.property:doseForm.uri, CodeSystem.property:doseForm.description, CodeSystem.property:doseForm.type, CodeSystem.property:brandName, CodeSystem.property:brandName.modifierExtension, CodeSystem.property:brandName.code, CodeSystem.property:brandName.uri, CodeSystem.property:brandName.description, CodeSystem.property:brandName.type, CodeSystem.property:activeStrength, CodeSystem.property:activeStrength.modifierExtension, CodeSystem.property:activeStrength.code, CodeSystem.property:activeStrength.uri, CodeSystem.property:activeStrength.description, CodeSystem.property:activeStrength.type, CodeSystem.property:activeIngredient, CodeSystem.property:activeIngredient.modifierExtension, CodeSystem.property:activeIngredient.code, CodeSystem.property:activeIngredient.uri, CodeSystem.property:activeIngredient.description, CodeSystem.property:activeIngredient.type, CodeSystem.concept, CodeSystem.concept.modifierExtension, CodeSystem.concept.code All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error CodeSystem.modifierExtension, CodeSystem.property.modifierExtension, CodeSystem.property:packageType.modifierExtension, CodeSystem.property:packageSize.modifierExtension, CodeSystem.property:doseForm.modifierExtension, CodeSystem.property:brandName.modifierExtension, CodeSystem.property:activeStrength.modifierExtension, CodeSystem.property:activeIngredient.modifierExtension, CodeSystem.concept.modifierExtension Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

This structure is derived from Shareable CodeSystem

CodeSystem.property.​code Base extensible RUIM - ValueSet des codes de propriétés médicament 📍0.0.1 cet IG
NomDrapeauxCard.TypeDescription et contraintes    Filter:
Bindings
Contraintes
Obligations
CodeSystem C 1..1 Shareable CodeSystem(4.0.1) Declares the existence of and describes a code system or code system supplement
Constraints: csd-0, csd-1
id Σ 0..1 id Logical id of this artifact
meta Σ 0..1 Meta Metadata about the resource
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
language 0..1 code Language of the resource content
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.
Bindings AdditionnelsBut
AllLanguages Binding Max
text 0..1 Narrative Text summary of the resource, for human interpretation
This profile does not constrain the narrative in regard to content, language, or traceability to data elements
contained 0..* Resource Contained, inline Resources
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Constraints: ext-1
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
Constraints: ext-1
url Σ 1..1 uri Canonical identifier for this code system, represented as a URI (globally unique) (Coding.system)
Motif requis: http://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/CodeSystem/terminologie-ruim-eprescription
identifier Σ 0..* Identifier Additional identifier for the code system (business identifier)
version Σ 1..1 string Business version of the code system (Coding.version)
name ΣC 1..1 string Name for this code system (computer friendly)
Motif requis: RUIM eeprescription
title Σ 1..1 string Name for this code system (human friendly)
Motif requis: RUIM - european eprescription
status ?!Σ 1..1 code draft | active | retired | unknown
Binding: PublicationStatus (required): The lifecycle status of an artifact.
experimental Σ 1..1 boolean For testing purposes, not real usage
date Σ 0..1 dateTime Date last changed
publisher Σ 1..1 string Name of the publisher (organization or individual)
contact Σ 0..* ContactDetail Contact details for the publisher
description 1..1 markdown Natural language description of the code system
useContext Σ 0..* UsageContext The context that the content is intended to support
jurisdiction Σ 0..* CodeableConcept Intended jurisdiction for code system (if applicable)
Binding: Jurisdiction ValueSet (extensible): Countries and regions within which this artifact is targeted for use.
purpose 0..1 markdown Why this code system is defined
copyright 0..1 markdown Use and/or publishing restrictions
caseSensitive Σ 1..1 boolean If code comparison is case sensitive
valueSet Σ 0..1 canonical(ValueSet) Canonical reference to the value set with entire code system
hierarchyMeaning Σ 0..1 code grouped-by | is-a | part-of | classified-with
Binding: CodeSystemHierarchyMeaning (required): The meaning of the hierarchy of concepts in a code system.
compositional Σ 0..1 boolean If code system defines a compositional grammar
versionNeeded Σ 0..1 boolean If definitions are not stable
content Σ 1..1 code not-present | example | fragment | complete | supplement
Binding: CodeSystemContentMode (required): The extent of the content of the code system (the concepts and codes it defines) are represented in a code system resource.
supplements Σ 0..1 canonical(CodeSystem) Canonical URL of Code System this adds designations and properties to
count Σ 0..1 unsignedInt Total concepts in the code system
filter Σ 0..* BackboneElement Filter that can be used in a value set
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Constraints: ext-1
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
code Σ 1..1 code Code that identifies the filter
description Σ 0..1 string How or why the filter is used
operator Σ 1..* code = | is-a | descendent-of | is-not-a | regex | in | not-in | generalizes | exists
Binding: FilterOperator (required): The kind of operation to perform as a part of a property based filter.
value Σ 1..1 string What to use for the value

modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized

AllLanguages Binding Max

Bindings terminologiques

Chemin Statut Usage Jeu de valeurs (ValueSet) Version Source
CodeSystem.language Base preferred Common Languages 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
CodeSystem.status Base required PublicationStatus 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR

CodeSystem.content Base required CodeSystemContentMode 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
CodeSystem.filter.operator Base required FilterOperator 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
CodeSystem.property.​code Base extensible RUIM - ValueSet des codes de propriétés médicament 📍0.0.1 cet IG
CodeSystem.property.​type Base required PropertyType 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
CodeSystem.property:packageType.​code Base extensible RUIM - ValueSet des codes de propriétés médicament 📍0.0.1 cet IG
CodeSystem.property:packageType.​type Base required PropertyType 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
CodeSystem.property:packageSize.​code Base extensible RUIM - ValueSet des codes de propriétés médicament 📍0.0.1 cet IG
CodeSystem.property:packageSize.​type Base required PropertyType 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
CodeSystem.property:doseForm.​code Base extensible RUIM - ValueSet des codes de propriétés médicament 📍0.0.1 cet IG
CodeSystem.property:doseForm.​type Base required PropertyType 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
CodeSystem.property:brandName.​code Base extensible RUIM - ValueSet des codes de propriétés médicament 📍0.0.1 cet IG
CodeSystem.property:brandName.​type Base required PropertyType 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
CodeSystem.property:activeStrength.​code Base extensible RUIM - ValueSet des codes de propriétés médicament 📍0.0.1 cet IG
CodeSystem.property:activeStrength.​type Base required PropertyType 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
CodeSystem.property:activeIngredient.​code Base extensible RUIM - ValueSet des codes de propriétés médicament 📍0.0.1 cet IG
CodeSystem.property:activeIngredient.​type Base required PropertyType 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
CodeSystem.concept.designation.​language Base preferred Common Languages 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
CodeSystem.concept.designation.​use Base extensible Designation Use 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR

Contraintes

Id Grade Chemin(s) Description Expression
csd-0 warning CodeSystem Name should be usable as an identifier for the module by machine processing applications such as code generation name.matches('[A-Z]([A-Za-z0-9_]){0,254}')
csd-1 error CodeSystem Within a code system definition, all the codes SHALL be unique concept.code.combine($this.descendants().concept.code).isDistinct()
dom-2 error CodeSystem If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error CodeSystem If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error CodeSystem If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error CodeSystem If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 bonne pratique CodeSystem A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()

This structure is derived from Shareable CodeSystem

Résumé

Obligatoire : 2 éléments
Must-Support : 6 éléments

Slices

Cette structure définit les slices suivantes:

  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of CodeSystem.property

Key Elements View

NomDrapeauxCard.TypeDescription et contraintes    Filter:
Bindings
Contraintes
Obligations
CodeSystem C 1..1 Shareable CodeSystem(4.0.1) Declares the existence of and describes a code system or code system supplement
Constraints: csd-0, csd-1
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
Constraints: ext-1
url Σ 1..1 uri Canonical identifier for this code system, represented as a URI (globally unique) (Coding.system)
Motif requis: http://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/CodeSystem/terminologie-ruim-eprescription
version Σ 1..1 string Business version of the code system (Coding.version)
name ΣC 1..1 string Name for this code system (computer friendly)
Motif requis: RUIM eeprescription
title Σ 1..1 string Name for this code system (human friendly)
Motif requis: RUIM - european eprescription
status ?!Σ 1..1 code draft | active | retired | unknown
Binding: PublicationStatus (required): The lifecycle status of an artifact.
experimental Σ 1..1 boolean For testing purposes, not real usage
publisher Σ 1..1 string Name of the publisher (organization or individual)
description 1..1 markdown Natural language description of the code system
caseSensitive Σ 1..1 boolean If code comparison is case sensitive
content Σ 1..1 code not-present | example | fragment | complete | supplement
Binding: CodeSystemContentMode (required): The extent of the content of the code system (the concepts and codes it defines) are represented in a code system resource.
Slices pour property Σ 0..* BackboneElement Propriétés des spécialités pharmaceutiques
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:code
property:Toutes les slices Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
code Σ 1..1 code Identifies the property on the concepts, and when referred to in operations
Binding: VSRuimPropertyCodes (0.0.1) (extensible)
type Σ 1..1 code code | Coding | string | integer | boolean | dateTime | decimal
Binding: PropertyType (required): The type of a property value.
property:packageType SΣ 0..1 BackboneElement Type de conditionnement
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1

Motif requis: packageType

Motif requis: http://data.esante.gouv.fr/ansm/medicament/packageType
description Σ 0..1 string Why the property is defined, and/or what it conveys
Motif requis: Type de contenant du médicament (ex : flacon, plaquette, ampoule).

Binding: PropertyType (required): The type of a property value.
Motif requis: string
property:packageSize SΣ 0..1 BackboneElement Taille du conditionnement

Motif requis: http://data.esante.gouv.fr/ansm/medicament/packageSize
description Σ 0..1 string Why the property is defined, and/or what it conveys
Motif requis: Nombre d'unités dans le conditionnement (ex : 1, 4, 28).
type Σ 1..1 code code | Coding | string | integer | boolean | dateTime | decimal
Binding: PropertyType (required): The type of a property value.
Motif requis: string
property:doseForm SΣ 0..1 BackboneElement Forme pharmaceutique
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
code Σ 1..1 code Identifies the property on the concepts, and when referred to in operations

Motif requis: doseForm

Motif requis: http://data.esante.gouv.fr/ansm/medicament/doseForm
description Σ 0..1 string Why the property is defined, and/or what it conveys
Motif requis: Forme galénique du médicament (ex : comprimé, solution pour perfusion).
type Σ 1..1 code code | Coding | string | integer | boolean | dateTime | decimal
Binding: PropertyType (required): The type of a property value.
Motif requis: string
property:brandName SΣ 0..1 BackboneElement Nom de marque
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
code Σ 1..1 code Identifies the property on the concepts, and when referred to in operations
Binding: VSRuimPropertyCodes (0.0.1) (extensible)
Motif requis: brandName
uri Σ 0..1 uri Formal identifier for the property
Motif requis: http://data.esante.gouv.fr/ansm/medicament/brandName
description Σ 0..1 string Why the property is defined, and/or what it conveys
Motif requis: Dénomination commerciale du médicament. Actuellement, le brandname est enrichi par les libellés de spécialité. Le partage du nom de marque est en cours de validation.
type Σ 1..1 code code | Coding | string | integer | boolean | dateTime | decimal
Binding: PropertyType (required): The type of a property value.
Motif requis: string

description Σ 0..1 string Why the property is defined, and/or what it conveys
Motif requis: Quantité de principe actif par unité de prise (ex : 10 mg pour 1 ml).

Id Grade Chemin(s) Description Expression
csd-0 warning CodeSystem Name should be usable as an identifier for the module by machine processing applications such as code generation name.matches('[A-Z]([A-Za-z0-9_]){0,254}')

dom-2 error CodeSystem If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error CodeSystem If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()

Contraintes
Obligations
CodeSystem C 1..1 Shareable CodeSystem(4.0.1) Declares the existence of and describes a code system or code system supplement
Constraints: csd-0, csd-1
id Σ 0..1 id Logical id of this artifact
meta Σ 0..1 Meta Metadata about the resource
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
language 0..1 code Language of the resource content
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.
Bindings AdditionnelsBut
AllLanguages Binding Max
text 0..1 Narrative Text summary of the resource, for human interpretation
This profile does not constrain the narrative in regard to content, language, or traceability to data elements
contained 0..* Resource Contained, inline Resources
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Constraints: ext-1
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
Constraints: ext-1
url Σ 1..1 uri Canonical identifier for this code system, represented as a URI (globally unique) (Coding.system)
Motif requis: http://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/CodeSystem/terminologie-ruim-eprescription
identifier Σ 0..* Identifier Additional identifier for the code system (business identifier)
version Σ 1..1 string Business version of the code system (Coding.version)
name ΣC 1..1 string Name for this code system (computer friendly)
Motif requis: RUIM eeprescription
title Σ 1..1 string Name for this code system (human friendly)
Motif requis: RUIM - european eprescription
status ?!Σ 1..1 code draft | active | retired | unknown
Binding: PublicationStatus (required): The lifecycle status of an artifact.
experimental Σ 1..1 boolean For testing purposes, not real usage
date Σ 0..1 dateTime Date last changed
publisher Σ 1..1 string Name of the publisher (organization or individual)
contact Σ 0..* ContactDetail Contact details for the publisher
description 1..1 markdown Natural language description of the code system
useContext Σ 0..* UsageContext The context that the content is intended to support
jurisdiction Σ 0..* CodeableConcept Intended jurisdiction for code system (if applicable)
Binding: Jurisdiction ValueSet (extensible): Countries and regions within which this artifact is targeted for use.
purpose 0..1 markdown Why this code system is defined
copyright 0..1 markdown Use and/or publishing restrictions
caseSensitive Σ 1..1 boolean If code comparison is case sensitive
valueSet Σ 0..1 canonical(ValueSet) Canonical reference to the value set with entire code system
hierarchyMeaning Σ 0..1 code grouped-by | is-a | part-of | classified-with
Binding: CodeSystemHierarchyMeaning (required): The meaning of the hierarchy of concepts in a code system.
compositional Σ 0..1 boolean If code system defines a compositional grammar
versionNeeded Σ 0..1 boolean If definitions are not stable
content Σ 1..1 code not-present | example | fragment | complete | supplement
Binding: CodeSystemContentMode (required): The extent of the content of the code system (the concepts and codes it defines) are represented in a code system resource.
supplements Σ 0..1 canonical(CodeSystem) Canonical URL of Code System this adds designations and properties to
count Σ 0..1 unsignedInt Total concepts in the code system
filter Σ 0..* BackboneElement Filter that can be used in a value set
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Constraints: ext-1
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
code Σ 1..1 code Code that identifies the filter
description Σ 0..1 string How or why the filter is used
operator Σ 1..* code = | is-a | descendent-of | is-not-a | regex | in | not-in | generalizes | exists
Binding: FilterOperator (required): The kind of operation to perform as a part of a property based filter.
value Σ 1..1 string What to use for the value

Contraintes

Id Grade Chemin(s) Description Expression
csd-0 warning CodeSystem Name should be usable as an identifier for the module by machine processing applications such as code generation name.matches('[A-Z]([A-Za-z0-9_]){0,254}')
csd-1 error CodeSystem Within a code system definition, all the codes SHALL be unique concept.code.combine($this.descendants().concept.code).isDistinct()
dom-2 error CodeSystem If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error CodeSystem If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error CodeSystem If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error CodeSystem If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 bonne pratique CodeSystem A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()

Résumé

Obligatoire : 2 éléments
Must-Support : 6 éléments

Slices

Cette structure définit les slices suivantes:

  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of CodeSystem.property

 

Other representations of profile: CSV, Excel, Schematron
